key.name: app-blacklist
key.description: List of app names, IDs, or WM classes to hide from the menu bar.

key.name: menu-icon
key.description: Icon for the system menu (position 0). Leave empty to auto-detect from your distro. Select "Apple" to use the Apple logo.

key.name: lock-to-focused-app
key.description: When enabled, the app menu stays locked to the currently focused app even when hovering over the panel. The menu only changes when you switch to a different window or show the desktop.

key.name: show-os-icon
key.description: Show the OS logo icon in the top panel. When hidden, the menu is still accessible but the icon is not displayed.

key.name: show-user-switcher
key.description: Show the user switcher button in the top panel for fast user switching. Only visible when multiple user accounts exist.
